2026-04-14T03:07:40.0269591Z ---
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0269944Z description: |
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0270633Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0271428Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0272254Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0272747Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0272908Z on:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0273259Z   push:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0273620Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0274057Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0274299Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0274472Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0274732Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0274902Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0275139Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0275314Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0275715Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0276192Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0276563Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0276916Z   noop:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0277282Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0277731Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0278078Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0278713Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0279486Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0279936Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0280675Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0281233Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0281624Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0282023Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0282421Z       steps:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0282820Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0283364Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0283852Z           env:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0284459Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0285183Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0285559Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0286075Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0286727Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0287404Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0288026Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0288425Z               }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0288642Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0289025Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0289751Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0290252Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0305426Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0306393Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0307233Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0308125Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0308735Z               }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0308981Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0309511Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0310134Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0310989Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0311584Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0312079Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0312601Z               });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0313084Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-14T03:07:40.0351350Z     branches: [main]

2026-04-14T03:07:40.0352578Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0352803Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0352961Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0353363Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0353823Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0354188Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0354537Z   noop:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0354905Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0355334Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0355703Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0356352Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0357080Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0357526Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0357984Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0358490Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0358870Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0359279Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0359665Z       steps:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0360083Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0360839Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0361334Z           env:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0361931Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0362635Z           with:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0363003Z             script: |
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0363524Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0364166Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0364843Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0365703Z                 return;
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0366097Z               }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0366337Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0366572Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0367287Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0367787Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0368239Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0369087Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0369912Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0371141Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0371749Z               }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0371963Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0372236Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0372858Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0373334Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0373866Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0374344Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0374887Z               });
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0375382Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0375810Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0375968Z tools:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0376325Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0376676Z   github:
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0377072Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0377357Z 
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0377530Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0378114Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0378802Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T03:07:40.0389066Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
